cta.title: Ready to launch your school workspace?
cta.description: Create your school account in under two minutes and invite your team.

LandingHero.title: One platform to run every school in your SMS SaaS.
LandingHero.description: Launch tenant onboarding, manage classrooms, track attendance, and automate billing with a clean, secure dashboard your admins and staff can trust.

items.title: Tenant-Isolated Architecture
items.description: Each school has strict data isolation with role-based controls.

items.title: Academic Operations
items.description: Manage students, staff, sections, and attendance in one workflow.

items.title: Billing & Subscription Ready
items.description: Track tuition, plan upgrades, and subscription lifecycle with confidence.

LandingPricing.title: Simple pricing for every school size
LandingPricing.description: Start free, then scale when your tenants grow.

Footer.copyright: © {year} Technet SMS SaaS. All rights reserved.

SignupPage.title: Start your SMS school in minutes.
SignupPage.description: We will create your tenant and your {role} account in one transaction. After verifying your email, you can sign in and manage staff, students, classes, and billing.

SignupForm.title: Create your school workspace
SignupForm.description: We will create a new tenant and your {role} account in one secure step.

slug.label: Subdomain Slug (optional)
slug.hint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

messages.invalidForm: Please check the form fields and try again.
messages.createdEmailFailed: School account created, but we could not send the verification code yet. Please use Resend Code.
messages.createdSuccess: School account created. Check your email for the verification code.
messages.schemaOutdated: Database schema is out of date. Please run migrations and try again.
messages.createFailed: We could not create your account right now. Please try again.

schoolName.min: School name must be at least 2 characters.

email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.

password.min: Password must be at least 8 characters.

slug.invalid: Please provide a valid school slug.
slug.pattern: Slug must be lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

messages.deviceDenied: Login request was denied by an approver.
messages.deviceExpired: Login approval request expired. Please try signing in again.
messages.deviceInvalid: Login approval request is no longer valid. Please sign in again.
messages.finishFailed: Unable to finish sign in. Please try again.
messages.sessionLocked: This account is already signed in on another device.
messages.twoFactorRequired: Enter your authenticator app code to continue.
messages.invalidTwoFactorCode: The authenticator code is invalid. Please try again.

TwoFactorPage.title: Two-factor verification
TwoFactorPage.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to finish signing in.

messages.codeRequired: Enter your authenticator app code to continue.
messages.invalidCode: The authenticator code is invalid. Please try again.
messages.sessionExpired: Your sign-in session expired. Please sign in again.
messages.signInFailed: Unable to finish sign in. Please try again.

VerifyEmailPage.title: Verify your email
VerifyEmailPage.description: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email to activate your account.

messages.initialEmailFailed: We created your account, but we could not send the verification code. Please click
messages.alreadyVerified: Email is already verified. Please sign in.
messages.codeMissing: Verification code not found. Please request a new code.
messages.codeExpired: Verification code expired. Please request a new code.
messages.verifySuccess: Email verified successfully. Please sign in.
messages.notRequired: Verification is not required for this account.
messages.cooldown: Please wait before requesting another code.
messages.sendFailed: Unable to send a new code right now. Please try again.
messages.resent: A new verification code has been sent.

timetable.title: Weekly Timetable
timetable.description: Your assigned schedule for this week.

school.title: Device Approvals

platform.title: Device Approvals
platform.description: Review and handle school admin device login requests.

placeholder.platform: Name, email, school, IP, user agent

list.title: Students
list.description: Create, manage, and enroll students into classes.

create.title: Create Student
create.description: Add a new student record to the SMS.

dialog.title: Delete student
dialog.description: This will permanently remove {name}. This action cannot be undone.

create.title: Create Staff
create.description: Create a new staff account and link it to a user.

edit.title: Edit Staff
edit.description: Update staff details and employment info.

list.title: Subjects
list.description: Manage curriculum subjects for your school.

create.title: Create Subject
create.description: Add a new subject to your school catalog.

table.empty: No subjects yet. Create your first subject to organize courses.

dialog.title: Delete subject
dialog.description: This will delete {name}. This action cannot be undone.

list.title: Courses
list.description: Manage courses and map them to subjects.

create.title: Create Course
create.description: Add a course and assign a subject.

edit.title: Edit Course
edit.description: Update course details and subject assignment.

table.empty: No courses yet. Create your first course to start building classes.

dialog.title: Delete course
dialog.description: This will delete {name}. This action cannot be undone.

table.empty: No classes yet. Create your first class.

list.title: Sections
list.description: Manage class sections and staff assignments.

create.title: Create Section
create.description: Add a section and optionally assign a staff.

table.empty: No sections yet. Create your first section.

list.title: Enrollments
list.description: Manage student enrollment, billing, attendance, and progress by section.

create.title: Create Enrollment
create.description: Enroll a student into a section and auto-create the first invoice.

edit.title: Edit Enrollment
edit.description: Update enrollment details, section assignment, and billing inputs.

dialog.title: Delete enrollment
dialog.description: This will delete the enrollment for {studentName}. This action cannot be undone.

list.title: Timetable
list.description: Manage weekly schedules and prevent staff conflicts.

activeTimetable.title: Active Timetable
activeTimetable.noActiveNow: No active slot at this moment.
activeTimetable.noneToday: No more timetable slots for today.

staffWeekly.title: {staff} Weekly Timetable
staffWeekly.description: Weekly board and timetable slots for {staff}.

board.title: Weekly Board
board.description: Drag to move, or right-click to copy and paste slots across days.

table.empty: No timetable slots yet. Create your first slot.

list.title: Attendance
list.description: Mark and review attendance per enrollment (student + section).

list.title: Staff Attendance
list.description: Track staff attendance per section, per day.

list.title: Invoices
list.description: Manage discounts, partial payments, refunds, and invoice documents.

confirm.title: Settle all filtered invoices?
confirm.description: This will create payments with method "Bulk Paid All" for the full remaining balance of every filtered unpaid/partial invoice across all pages.

list.title: Payments
list.description: Track monthly fees, deposits, and invoice status.

list.title: Payroll
list.description: Generate and review monthly staff payroll.

generate.title: Generate Payroll
generate.description: Generates (or updates) payroll for all staff.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose between system, light, or dark mode.

profilePhoto.description: Upload or remove your profile image.

changeEmail.description: Update the email address associated with your account.

changePassword.description: Update your password and keep your account secure.

security.title: Account Security
